widget.title: Whisper
panel.title: Whisper
panel.placeholder: Type a message or press record...
panel.emptyHint: Click the record button or use your keyboard shortcut
errors.noSttKey: No Groq API key configured. Go to Settings to add your free key.
errors.noLlmKey: No API key configured for the selected AI provider.
errors.transcriptionFailed: Speech transcription failed. Check your API key and try again.
errors.noSpeechDetected: No speech detected. Please try again.
errors.requestFailed: AI request failed. Check your API key and try again.
settings.sttNote: Speech recognition is powered by Groq's Whisper API (free tier available).
settings.llmProviderDesc: Choose which AI model to use for responses
settings.temperatureDesc: Higher = more creative, Lower = more focused
settings.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are a helpful voice assistant...
settings.maxHistoryDesc: Maximum number of messages to keep in history
settings.panelDetachedDesc: Panel floats freely instead of attaching to bar
settings.panelPositionDesc: Where the panel appears on screen
settings.panelWidthDesc: Width of the panel in pixels
settings.ipcNote:
Bind this command to a keyboard shortcut in your compositor:
qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call plugin:whisper toggle
